opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My face and scalp are completely covered in these gross, greasy yellow scabs. My eyelids are stuck together, and it burns so badly I can't even go outside.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A severe flare of greasy yellow scaling on my face/scalp with crusted, stuck-together eyelids.

symptom_narrative.onset: chronic mild dandruff, severe flare over 72h after stress and dry winter weather
symptom_narrative.character: greasy yellow scaly red patches, itchy and burning; crusted eyelids
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: scalp, sides of the nose, eyebrows, mid-chest, and eyelids
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: eyelids crust and stick shut in the morning; eyes mildly red but vision normal; no punched-out sores; no fever
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: housebound with distress and eye discomfort

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: recent major stress; dry winter weather

communication_style.typical_message_style: distressed about appearance and eye discomfort

objective_data_offered.value: greasy yellow scaling on the scalp, sides of the nose, eyebrows and mid-chest with underlying redness; greasy crusts along the eyelash bases; eyes mildly red
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view; cannot do a slit-lamp/fluorescein eye exam

objective_data_offered.value: eyelids crust and stick together in the morning; eyes a bit red but vision is normal, no sharp pain or light sensitivity
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-report; corneal involvement cannot be excluded remotely
